languages.text: Братья Караула Смерти не являются его постоянными членами — прочие ордена Астартес откомандировывают их для выполнения определенной миссии или на определенный срок. Миссии ордена проходят в условиях жесточайшей секретности, а информация о его существовании доступна далеко не каждому. Все, кто вступил в это таинственное братство, связаны множеством древних обетов, и эти клятвы сохраняют завесу тайны вокруг деятельности Караула лучше, чем любые другие предохранительне меры.

The brothers of the Deathwatch are not a permanent standing force — other Astartes Chapters second their warriors to the Deathwatch for a specific mission or a discrete period of time. The Chapter's missions are carried out under the strictest secrecy, and information about the Chapter's existence is known only to a select few. All those who join this mysterious brotherhood are bound by many ancient vows, and these vows maintain the veil of secrecy around the activities of the Deathwatch better than any other protective measures.
languages.original_text: Братья Караула Смерти не являются его постоянными членами — прочие ордена Астартес откомандировывают их для выполнения определенной миссии или на определенный срок. Миссии ордена проходят в условиях жесточайшей секретности, а информация о его существовании доступна далеко не каждому. Все, кто вступил в это таинственное братство, связаны множеством древних обетов, и эти клятвы сохраняют завесу тайны вокруг деятельности Караула лучше, чем любые другие предохранительне меры.

The Chapter's missions are carried out under the strictest secrecy, and information about the Chapter's existence is known only to a select few. All those who join this mysterious brotherhood are bound by many ancient vows, and these vows maintain the veil of secrecy around the activities of the Deathwatch better than any other protective measures.

languages.text: Los hermanos de los Vigías de la Muerte no son una fuerza permanente. Otros capítulos de Astartes ceden a sus guerreros a los Vigías de la Muerte para misiones concretas o por cierto período de tiempo. Las misiones del capítulo se desarrollan en el más absoluto secreto y su misma existencia es algo que solo unos pocos conocen. Cualquiera que entre en la misteriosa hermandad queda atado por numerosos juramentos ancestrales que mantienen el secreto en torno a las actividades de los Vigías de la Muerte mejor que ninguna otra medida protectora.
languages.original_text: The brothers of the Deathwatch are not a permanent standing force — other Astartes Chapters second their warriors to the Deathwatch for a specific mission or a discrete period of time. The Chapter's missions are carried out under the strictest secrecy, and information about the Chapter's existence is known only to a select few. All those who join this mysterious brotherhood are bound by many ancient vows, and these vows maintain the veil of secrecy around the activities of the Deathwatch better than any other protective measures.

languages.text: 死亡守望的兄弟们并非常设部队，其战士由其他阿斯塔特战团派遣，以完成特定任务或服役一段时间。战团的任务在最严密的保密制度下展开，而知晓其存在的人也寥寥无几。所有加入这个神秘兄弟会的人都受诸多古老誓言的制约，而这些誓言比任何保密措施都更为有效，牢牢守护着死亡守望的秘密。
languages.original_text: The brothers of the Deathwatch are not a permanent standing force — other Astartes Chapters second their warriors to the Deathwatch for a specific mission or a discrete period of time. The Chapter's missions are carried out under the strictest secrecy, and information about the Chapter's existence is known only to a select few. All those who join this mysterious brotherhood are bound by many ancient vows, and these vows maintain the veil of secrecy around the activities of the Deathwatch better than any other protective measures.

languages.text: Les frères de la Deathwatch ne constituent pas un corps militaire permanent. En effet, d'autres chapitres de l'Astartes envoient leurs guerriers à la Deathwatch pour des missions précises ou une période prédéfinie. Les missions du chapitre se déroulent sous le sceau du secret, et l'existence même de la Deathwatch reste un secret bien gardé. Tous ceux qui rejoignent cette mystérieuse confrérie sont liés par des serments séculaires, qui s'avèrent plus efficaces que toute autre mesure préventive pour maintenir le secret quant aux activités de la Deathwatch.
languages.original_text: The brothers of the Deathwatch are not a permanent standing force — other Astartes Chapters second their warriors to the Deathwatch for a specific mission or a discrete period of time. The Chapter's missions are carried out under the strictest secrecy, and information about the Chapter's existence is known only to a select few. All those who join this mysterious brotherhood are bound by many ancient vows, and these vows maintain the veil of secrecy around the activities of the Deathwatch better than any other protective measures.

traits.locale_text: Les frères de la Deathwatch ne constituent pas un corps militaire permanent. En effet, d'autres chapitres de l'Astartes envoient leurs guerriers à la Deathwatch pour des missions précises ou une période prédéfinie. Les missions du chapitre se déroulent sous le sceau du secret, et l'existence même de la Deathwatch reste un secret bien gardé. Tous ceux qui rejoignent cette mystérieuse confrérie sont liés par des serments séculaires, qui s'avèrent plus efficaces que toute autre mesure préventive pour maintenir le secret quant aux activités de la Deathwatch.

languages.text: Ölümnöbeti kardeşliği, kalıcı bir düzenli ordu değildir. Diğer Astartes Tümenleri, savaşçılarını özel bir görev veya belirli bir zaman dilimi için geçici olarak Ölümnöbeti bünyesine verir. Tümen'in görevleri en üst düzey gizlilikle yürütülür ve Tümen'in varlığına dair bilgilere yalnızca seçkin bir azınlık erişebilir. Bu gizemli kardeşliğe katılanların tümü, birçok kadim yemin eder ve bu yeminler, Ölümnöbeti'nin faaliyetlerini örten gizlilik perdesini diğer tüm koruyucu tedbirlerden daha iyi muhafaza eder.
languages.original_text: The brothers of the Deathwatch are not a permanent standing force — other Astartes Chapters second their warriors to the Deathwatch for a specific mission or a discrete period of time. The Chapter's missions are carried out under the strictest secrecy, and information about the Chapter's existence is known only to a select few. All those who join this mysterious brotherhood are bound by many ancient vows, and these vows maintain the veil of secrecy around the activities of the Deathwatch better than any other protective measures.

languages.text: 死の番人は恒久的な常備軍ではなく、他のアスタテス章が特定の任務や限定的な期間のために死の番人の戦士を派遣する。死の番人の章の任務は厳重な秘密の下で行われ、その存在に関する情報は限られた人々にしか知られていない。この神秘的な兄弟団に加入した者は古くからの誓約に縛られ、これらの誓約は死の番人の活動を取り巻く秘密のベールを、他のどんな保護策よりも効果的に維持している。
languages.original_text: The brothers of the Deathwatch are not a permanent standing force — other Astartes Chapters second their warriors to the Deathwatch for a specific mission or a discrete period of time. The Chapter's missions are carried out under the strictest secrecy, and information about the Chapter's existence is known only to a select few. All those who join this mysterious brotherhood are bound by many ancient vows, and these vows maintain the veil of secrecy around the activities of the Deathwatch better than any other protective measures.

languages.text: Die Brüder der Deathwatch bilden kein stehendes Heer. Andere Astartes-Kapitel schicken ihre Krieger für begrenzte Zeit oder eine spezifische Mission zur Deathwatch. Die Operationen des Kapitels unterliegen strengster Geheimhaltung, und Informationen über die Existenz des Kapitels sind einigen Wenigen vorbehalten. Wer sich dieser geheimnisvollen Bruderschaft anschließt, ist an viele alte Eide gebunden, die die Aktivitäten der Deathwatch besser mit einem Schleier der Geheimhaltung belegen, als jede andere Schutzmaßnahme.
